content: Asaas API v3: POST /v3/subscriptions exige customer, billingType, value, cycle (MONTHLY/YEARLY), nextDueDate, description. Ao criar a assinatura a primeira cobranca e gerada automaticamente e dispara webhook PAYMENT_CREATED contendo o id da subscription. Customer criado antes via POST /v3/customers (nome + cpfCnpj obrigatorios). Sandbox: https://api-sandbox.asaas.com/v3. Existe tambem checkout hospedado (chargeTypes RECURRENT + objeto subscription) com callbacks successUrl/cancelUrl/expiredUrl.
